parameters.query:
INSERT INTO hwc.calculator_leads (
  report_id, calculator, contact_name, contact_phone, contact_email, contact_notes,
  project_state, estimate_low, estimate_high, preferred_date, preferred_time,
  attribution, landing_page, referrer, source_page
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.report_id }}',
  '{{ $json.calculator }}',
  '{{ $json.contact_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.contact_phone }}',
  '{{ $json.contact_email }}',
  '{{ ($json.contact_notes || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.stringify($json.project_state).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb,
  {{ $json.estimate_low }},
  {{ $json.estimate_high }},
  {{ $json.preferred_date ? "'" + $json.preferred_date + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.preferred_time ? "'" + $json.preferred_time + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.attribution ? "'" + JSON.stringify($json.attribution).replace(/'/g, "''") + "'::jsonb" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ ($json.landing_page || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.referrer || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.source_page || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
) RETURNING id, report_id;

UPDATE hwc.calculator_leads
SET jt_account_id = {{ $json.jt_account_id ? "'" + $json.jt_account_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    jt_contact_id = {{ $json.jt_contact_id ? "'" + $json.jt_contact_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    jt_job_id     = {{ $json.jt_job_id     ? "'" + $json.jt_job_id     + "'" : 'NULL' }},
    status        = 'contacted',
    contacted_at  = now()
WHERE report_id = '{{ $json.report_id }}';
